common.errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred while loading the page. Please try again.
common.hotkeyGuide: Esc closes or goes back; Cmd/Ctrl + Enter confirms.

landing.heroDesc: Claim a subdomain, configure DNS records, and get your project online in seconds. Simple, fast, and powered by Cloudflare.
landing.featureInstantDesc: Claim a subdomain and add DNS records in under a minute. No waiting, no approval process.
landing.featureCloudflareDesc: DNS records sync directly with Cloudflare for enterprise-grade reliability and speed.
landing.featureControlDesc: Manage A, AAAA, CNAME, and TXT records. Toggle Cloudflare proxy. Set custom TTL values.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for developers who want DNS without the overhead.
landing.statDesc: Full DNS record management with validation & conflict detection
landing.step1Desc: Browse available domains and claim a subdomain with your account.
landing.step2Desc: Create A, AAAA, CNAME or TXT records directly from the dashboard.
landing.step3Desc: Records propagate automatically via Cloudflare. No manual steps needed.
landing.footerTagline: Subdomain and DNS management for developers.

matchType.unreachableHint: If the first probe is inaccessible, a second attempt runs automatically. Matches only when both attempts are inaccessible; any successful attempt does not match (if the first fails but the second succeeds, no other rules are evaluated either). No match targets required. A channel is inaccessible if: (1) the connection fails or times out (e.g. DNS failure, connection refused, TLS handshake failure); (2) the connection succeeded but fetching fails, such as while reading the response body (private-IP SSRF blocks are excluded); (3) any HTTP 5xx status; (4) most 4xx statuses, except 401, 404, and 429.

banNotify.title: Ban notification
banNotify.hint: Leave empty to skip notification. Sent after ban or DNS deletion succeeds.
banNotify.placeholder: e.g. Your subdomain {{fqdn}} was suspended for violating {{rule_name}}.

exempt.title: Exemption
exempt.hint: Skip enforcement on first hit; auto rescan after delay. Normal action applies if still matched.
exempt.notifyPlaceholder: e.g. {{fqdn}} is temporarily unreachable. Please fix before {{recheck_at}}.
